name: Smoked Salmon & Spinach Scramble
description: A fast, one-pan egg scramble with salmon and greens — no knife work required.
recipeInstructions: Cook: Warm olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Toss in baby spinach and stir until wilted. Crack in eggs and scramble until just set. Tear smoked salmon into the pan and stir through.
Serve: Plate and top with sliced avocado. Serve with toast.
